Raja.description: Moves exactly 1 square in any direction.

Gaja.description: Moves exactly 2 squares diagonally. Can jump over intervening pieces.

Ashva.description: Standard Knight L-shape move. Can jump over other pieces.

Ratha.description: Moves any number of empty squares straight horizontally or vertically.

Padati.description: Moves 1 square straight forward. Captures 1 square diagonally forward. No initial double-step.

2-Player.description: Traditional 2-sided military simulation. White vs Black.

4-Player.description: Ancient Chaturaji mode. 4 players control 4 corners clockwise. Red, Green, Yellow, and Black.
4-Player.diceRule: Historically uses a 4-sided stick dice to decide which piece can move.
